files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags:
+      - 'v*'
+
+jobs:
+  release:
+    name: Release Zed Extension
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: huacnlee/zed-extension-action@v1
+        with:
+          extension-name: tql
+          push-to: tenzir/extensions
+        env:
+          COMMITTER_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.COMMITTER_TOKEN }}
